project_type: Full-stack photo tagging application with ML pipeline
build_system: uv for Python dependency management, pnpm for Node.js/Next.js
test_framework: pytest for backend, jest/vitest for frontend
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/backend && uv run python -c 'import app; print("Backend OK")' && cd /projects/sandbox/frontend && pnpm build
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/backend && uv run pytest tests/ -v && cd /projects/sandbox/frontend && pnpm test
verification_instructions: 1. Start backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000. 2. Start frontend: cd frontend && pnpm dev. 3. Upload a photo via UI or curl POST /api/photos/upload. 4. Verify tags appear in response. 5. Verify filter panel works with tag categories.
setup_instructions: 1. pyenv local 3.11.15 in backend dir. 2. uv sync in backend dir. 3. pnpm install in frontend dir.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to install packages. Python 3.11.15 available via pyenv. Node 22 with pnpm. No GPU - ML models will run on CPU (lightweight variants preferred for demo). SQLite for database (no external DB service needed).
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - establish clean architecture patterns from scratch.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI with async endpoints, SQLAlchemy ORM with SQLite, Pydantic schemas, service layer pattern. Frontend: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Query for data fetching. ML Pipeline: Pluggable analyzers with a common interface, async processing.
directory_structure: backend/ - Python FastAPI application with ML analysis pipeline. frontend/ - Next.js 14 React application with photo grid and filter UI. Both at /projects/sandbox/ root level.
